title: Adding signal output will cause abnormal simulation output in iverilog

features.name: multi-operand concatenation with for-loop variable and wire
features.description: Code should include a multi-operand concatenation where a for-loop variable is concatenated with a wire, assigned to an output signal

features.name: single-operand concatenation with for-loop variable
features.description: Code should include a single-operand concatenation containing a for-loop variable assigned to a wire
